scripts.start:e2e:at4:some: cross-env EXPO_PUBLIC_E2E_PREAUTH=1 EXPO_PUBLIC_E2E_MOCK_EVENTS=1 EXPO_PUBLIC_E2E_EVENTS_MODE=some expo start --clear
scripts.start:e2e:at4:many: cross-env EXPO_PUBLIC_E2E_PREAUTH=1 EXPO_PUBLIC_E2E_MOCK_EVENTS=1 EXPO_PUBLIC_E2E_EVENTS_MODE=many expo start --clear
scripts.start:e2e:at4:empty: cross-env EXPO_PUBLIC_E2E_PREAUTH=1 EXPO_PUBLIC_E2E_MOCK_EVENTS=1 EXPO_PUBLIC_E2E_EVENTS_MODE=empty expo start --clear
scripts.detox:build:android: cross-env EXPO_PUBLIC_E2E_PREAUTH=1 EXPO_PUBLIC_E2E_MOCK_EVENTS=1 EXPO_PUBLIC_E2E_EVENTS_MODE=many detox build -c android.emu.debug
